title: ononis repens subsp. caduca
intro: Ononis repens subsp. caduca is a subspecies of the greater burnet-saxifrage plant, also known as Ononis repens, which is a perennial herb native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Ononis repens subsp. caduca include its ability to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Ononis repens subsp. caduca can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
